product_name: The Little Book of Famous Insults — Peter Pauper Press (1964)
attributes: 1964 • Peter Pauper Press • 1st Edition • Ed. Betty Jo Ramsey • Ill. Fritz Kredel • Decorated Boards
condition_notes: Hardcover gift book, The Little Book of Famous Insults, Peter Pauper Press (Mount Vernon, NY), copyright 1964; edited by Betty Jo Ramsey, illustrated by Fritz Kredel. Decorated paper-covered boards in a brown thorn/branch motif with a green spine-label panel. Condition Very Good: boards bright and clean, binding firm and square, text unmarked. Retains its original Rockford College bookstore price ticket tucked inside the front ('ROCKFORD COLLEGE / F66 / NO REFUND IF TICKET REMOVED / 12.5') — left in place as provenance. No dust jacket (as issued / none present). Ships easily via USPS Media Mail.
